framework.name: Visa Intelligent Commerce Agent Payment Framework
framework.description: An infrastructure layer enabling AI agents to execute secure, personalized transactions on behalf of users through agent-specific tokenization, consent-based personalization, device-based authentication, and consumer-controlled transaction policies. Positions Visa as middleware between agents and merchants rather than just payment rails.
framework.raw_quote: Visa Intelligent Commerce is a suite of APIs and tools that let AI agents: Obtain agent-specific payment tokens tied to user credentials, Use personalization signals with user consent to tailor recommendations, Authenticate purchases using strong, device-based keys, Enforce consumer-controlled transaction policies, Track payment events and handle disputes programmatically

source.title: How Visa Enables AI Agents to Shop and Pay - Soniclinker - Create Agent Optimized Websites
